
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Horse|kanji=壬午|romaji=mizunoe uma|onyomi=jingo|p=rénwǔ|w=jen-wu|mi=ʐən³⁵ u²¹|y=jam4 ng5|j=jam4 ng5|ci=jɐm ŋo|mc=ɲiɪm ŋo|oc-bs=ɲɨm ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Horse also known as 壬午''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Horse|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|1=Horse (zodiac)|lt=Horse (午)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16683439}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Overcoming|ja|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Overcoming|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=五行思想|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}} (Water overcomes Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Horse (壬午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: jin go
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imo (임오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Ngọ

==Years of Yang Water Horse==
A {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year that leaves a remainder of 22 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=Year|1=Year}} of Ren-Go.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Ren-Go'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 22|en|AD 22|qid=Q24507|lt=22 AD|1=AD 22}}
* {{ill|AD 82|en|AD 82|qid=Q30396|lt=82 AD|1=AD 82}}
* {{ill|AD 142|en|AD 142|qid=Q31359|lt=142 AD|1=AD 142}}
* {{ill|202|en|202|qid=Q30333|lt=202 AD|1=202}}
* {{ill|262|en|262|qid=Q32088|lt=262 AD|1=262}}
* {{ill|322|en|322|qid=Q34068|lt=322 AD|1=322}}
* {{ill|382|en|382|qid=Q34512|lt=382 AD|1=382}}
* {{ill|AD 442|en|AD 442|qid=Q32642|lt=442 AD|1=AD 442}}
* {{ill|AD 502|en|AD 502|qid=Q31024|lt=502 AD|1=AD 502}}
* {{ill|562|en|562|qid=Q32687|lt=562 AD|1=562}}
* {{ill|622|en|622|qid=Q23876|lt=622 AD|1=622}}
* {{ill|682|en|682|qid=Q30607|lt=682 AD|1=682}}
* {{ill|742|en|742|qid=Q23601|lt=742 AD|1=742}}
* {{ill|802|en|802|qid=Q29992|lt=802 AD|1=802}}
* {{ill|862|en|862|qid=Q24993|lt=862 AD|1=862}}
* {{ill|922|en|922|qid=Q24219|lt=922 AD|1=922}}
* {{ill|982|en|982|qid=Q23780|lt=982 AD|1=982}}
|
* {{ill|1042|en|1042|qid=Q19346|lt=1042 AD|1=1042}}
* {{ill|1102|en|1102|qid=Q12069|lt=1102 AD|1=1102}}
* {{ill|1162|en|1162|qid=Q19667|lt=1162 AD|1=1162}}
* {{ill|1222|en|1222|qid=Q5397|lt=1222 AD|1=1222}}
* {{ill|1282|en|1282|qid=Q5541|lt=1282 AD|1=1282}}
* {{ill|1342|en|1342|qid=Q6069|lt=1342 AD|1=1342}}
* {{ill|1402|en|1402|qid=Q6113|lt=1402 AD|1=1402}}
* {{ill|1462|en|1462|qid=Q6546|lt=1462 AD|1=1462}}
* {{ill|1522|en|1522|qid=Q6299|lt=1522 AD|1=1522}}
* {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582 AD|1=1582}}
* {{ill|1642|en|1642|qid=Q6912|lt=1642 AD|1=1642}}
* {{ill|1702|en|1702|qid=Q6819|lt=1702 AD|1=1702}}
* {{ill|1762|en|1762|qid=Q7652|lt=1762 AD|1=1762}}
* {{ill|1822|en|1822|qid=Q6983|lt=1822 AD|1=1822}}
* {{ill|1882|en|1882|qid=Q7812|lt=1882 AD|1=1882}}
* {{ill|1942|en|1942|qid=Q18625|lt=1942 AD|1=1942}}
|
* {{ill|2002|en|2002|qid=Q1987|lt=2002 AD|1=2002}}
* {{ill|2062 AD|ja|2062年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2062|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2062 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2060年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2122 AD|ja|2122年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2122|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2122 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2182 AD|ja|2182年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2182|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2182 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2242 AD|ja|2242年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2242|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2242 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2302 AD|ja|2302年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2302 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2362 AD|ja|2362年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2362|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2362 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2422 AD|ja|2422年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2422|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2422 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2482 AD|ja|2482年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2482|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2482 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2542 AD|ja|2542年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2542|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2542 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2602 AD|ja|2602年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2602|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2602 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2662 AD|ja|2662年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2662|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2662 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2722 AD|ja|2722年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2722|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2722 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2782 AD|ja|2782年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2782|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2782 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2842 AD|ja|2842年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2842|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2842 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2902 AD|ja|2902年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2902|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2902 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2962 AD|ja|2962年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2962|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2962 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10th Year (1582 AD) – the {{ill|Tenshō Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|天正壬午の乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Tenshō-Jingo war|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) – the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|壬午事変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=壬午軍乱|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|qid=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)|1=Month}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|qid=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|qid=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Shōdo|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571306}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Water Horse|qq=ja|壬午|version=94891260|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062004|af|Waterperd (astrologie)|cdo|Ìng-ngū|de|Wasser-Pferd|fr|Cheval d'eau|hak|Ngìm-ńg|ja|壬午|ko|임오|nds|Water-Peerd|vi|Nhâm Ngọ|za|Nyaemzngux|zh-min-nan|Jîm-ngó͘|zh-yue|壬午|zh|壬午|zh-min-nan|Lîm-chin|cdo|Yîm-cṳ̄de|nds|Wasser-Pferdevi|de|Yang Water Horse|fr|Cheval de eau|de|Wasser-Pferdeen|en|Water Horse|fr|Cheval de eauboishak|it|Yim-chṳ́id|za|Yimceij|ar|Yang Water Horse}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
